name: Rice Ball in Coconut Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 cup rice flour, 1/2 cup arrowroot, and 1/4 cup cold water.
2. Turn the mixture out onto a smooth surface and knead until it reaches the consistency of a pie crust. Add more water if needed.
3. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls.
4. Bring a large pot half full with water to a boil.
5. Drop the balls in four at a time and boil for 4 to 5 minutes, or until they float to the top.
6. Cook the rest of the balls this way.
7. In a large pot, heat the coconut milk, sugar, salt, and vanilla over medium heat for 5 to 7 minutes.
8. Add the rice balls and cook, stirring constantly, until the milk starts to boil. Serve hot.
